name: llmflows-test
description: Simple smoke test: write a haiku to verify the flow pipeline works end-to-end.

steps.name: Write haiku
steps.content:
# WRITE A HAIKU

Write a haiku about software engineering.

Save it to `{{step.dir}}/_result.md`.

Also save a short notification message to `{{run.dir}}/inbox.md` so that a notification is sent when the run completes.

gates.message: inbox.md must exist with the notification message.
